description: A naturalistic painting of white water lilies floating on a dark pond. Several large white blossoms are open, surrounded by broad green and golden lily pads of varying sizes. The dark water reflects the sky and creates contrasts with the bright flowers and green leaves. Grasses and reeds are visible at the lower left edge. The painting captures the interplay of light on water and vegetation with loose, impressionistic brushwork and a rich palette of greens, golds, whites, and deep blues.

_meta.title: Water Lilies, Study for the Youth and a Mermaid
